# Restore & Relax — Mobile Massage Therapy by Iulia

> Professional mobile massage therapy delivered to your home across Woking and Surrey, UK.

## About

Restore & Relax is a sole-trader mobile massage therapy business operated by Iulia, based in Woking, Surrey. All treatments are delivered at the client's home — no clinic travel required. Travel fees are included in every treatment price.

## Services & Pricing

| Treatment | 60 min | 90 min |
|---|---|---|
| Sports Massage | £70 | £100 |
| Deep Tissue Massage | £70 | £100 |
| Swedish Massage | £70 | £100 |
| Pregnancy Massage | £70 | — |
| Manual Lymphatic Drainage | £70 | — |
| Oncology Massage | £60 | — |

## Coverage Area

Based in Woking, Surrey. Covers a 10-mile radius including: Guildford, Camberley, Weybridge, Cobham, Leatherhead, Byfleet, West Byfleet, Farnborough, Aldershot, Fleet, Send, Ripley, Pyrford and surrounding villages.

## How to Book

Contact Iulia via WhatsApp to check availability and arrange a session. She will come to your home with all equipment.

## Key Facts

- Fully qualified massage therapist
- Mobile / home visits only
- All travel fees included in price
- Serves Woking, Surrey and surrounding areas within 10 miles
- Treatments available 7 days a week
- Specialisms include oncology massage and manual lymphatic drainage

## Contact

WhatsApp booking only. See website for current contact details.
